name: Audio Spectrum Bars
description: Classic spectrum analyzer: live audio is analyzed into a frequency spectrum and drawn as colored bars in a GLSL TOP. The spectrum is clamped to 256 bins (setmanually) so the CHOP-to-TOP texture stays a sane width, and the bars TOP has an explicit output resolution so it renders a full-height frame instead of inheriting the 1-row spectrum texture size. Live-validated in TouchDesigner 099 build 2025.32820.

nodes.name: spectrum
nodes.comment: FFT spectrum, clamped to 256 bins so audio_tex is 256×1 (not the default ~16k-wide strip)

nodes.name: bars
nodes.comment: Draws the bars from the spectrum texture at an explicit resolution (so out1 is a full-height frame, not a 1px strip)

preview_description: A row of glowing cyan-to-magenta bars rising and falling with the music. Live-validated in TouchDesigner 099 build 2025.32820.
